# Daily Report — 2026-06-21

## Task Completed
Added `bulk_update_change_tasks` tool — PATCH multiple change tasks in ServiceNow
using a single Batch API call. Accepts up to 100 `ChangeTaskUpdate` entries each
with a `task_id` (CTASK number or sys_id) plus any combination of 9 optional
fields: `short_description`, `description`, `state`, `assigned_to`,
`assignment_group`, `planned_start_date`, `planned_end_date`, `work_notes`,
`close_notes`. CTASK numbers are batch-resolved to sys_ids with one preliminary
GET before the PATCH batch is issued. Registered in `change_coordinator` and
`full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1748
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system package vulnerabilities (setuptools 68.1.2, urllib3 2.6.3,
wheel 0.42.0) — none in project code.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — exported `bulk_update_change_tasks`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported + registered tool
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `change_coordinator` and `full`
- `tests/test_bulk_update_change_tasks.py` — 21 new tests
